## What this PR does

<!-- One to three sentences. Focus on the why, not just the what. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New command
- [ ] New agent or profile
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor / improvement
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] `FEATURES.md` updated (if adding a skill or command)
- [ ] Frontmatter present on all new `.md` files (`name`, `description`)
- [ ] Naming follows kebab-case conventions
- [ ] Tested manually — `/maestro doctor` passes with no new errors
- [ ] Steps are specific enough for an agent to follow without guessing
- [ ] Error handling is addressed (what happens when things go wrong?)
